textByHash.0291b3b1609d6f76b41840451a01b5a4162f1752: Flight Commander Waydar, now that reinitialisation is complete, I order you to fly to the south of Karamja with .
textByHash.08605db7180f7ec57aa389b12ff3917e5a84bb5b: For you, it should hardly take any time at all.
textByHash.0bf42c3c86eff6296c12b03bd860237a6b35da24: Come and find me on the Grand Tree. I will probably be at the bar.
textByHash.0bf67b81391b28f2e546a8017e449d67d52c1a48: We do not know. Initial reports spoke of a large atoll populated by monkeys.
textByHash.1b1889ae3e58f773fcf260acd0eeb8fbb67fa908: In the face of danger, they can more than take care of themselves.
textByHash.1cbd195b406ed22f4bdf1b02b459f845c9e0c906: When reinitialisation has been completed, you are to fly to the south of Karamja with and accompany them on the mission.
textByHash.1fa7ce095885cba094157c8deeadb887c87739f7: Well hand them over here then.
textByHash.2083e5a66599bf0ab6dc30b2808bb11731c4700e: Given your recent performance of uncovering and neutralising a threat at the very extremes of the Gnome hierarchy, the King has decreed that you are to undertake a reconnaisance mission.
textByHash.248650cc0710fc1b690c30edb51dfe62365ed991: You are to safeguard her on this potentially dangerous mission.
textByHash.31beaa76035b3b844854f5d9570ff03f9add6781: It is my responsibility to make arrangements for your mission. We will shortly visit a colleague of mine who will be accompanying you.
textByHash.33faf0c39aba3058848a0658656fde20a0875529: You should aim to make contact with him.
textByHash.377d52278b437fb5edebebc286c37a618404ac4d: Quite. She is now on a secret mission for the King.
textByHash.3a00031e704976137d98fc7c5ee6203443f8b08a: Quite. He is now on a secret mission for the King.
textByHash.3b6752a99f8cb0305232d62c25f4dd175cd9661f: The Royal Guard is composed of particularly elite soldiers who have proven themselves in battle. They are duty bound to protect the Grand Tree its King and his interests.
textByHash.4db95f4d3a640a06571d10c0c89d488f5c392190: They are, as you humans might say, the best of the best. As well as Sergeant Garkor, they have in their company a High Mage, two sappers and battle hardened foot soldiers.
textByHash.55df38ffae2a91c82f0b8dda06fd9ac822f31ad5: It is written in an old military code. Bear with me whilst I decode this.
textByHash.594a41218b5c7e6fe1d5ac63cc7714d6c1c0d4c4: You might consider the role as that of an engineer. Or perhaps of a munitions expert.
textByHash.5c6f8ec63692a60b0ec26def1b2677d909608e90: You will improve your strength, stamina, attack and defence, but you may choose what you want to focus on.
textByHash.5ea0aaf98537be905aa90a34d3122e9bcc97cd3d: There is a teleporter round the corner.
textByHash.6481edf9fbde7630d254ac1b6dab3b9ad9febb1d: Well done, adventurer. You have managed to break Glough's code. Now the process of reinitialisation is complete, you can truly begin your journey into the unknown.
textByHash.673da2128954c5cb0062754573a18bae1af0e975: Not just any old visitor Waydar; this is the person who exposed Glough and defeated his demon.
textByHash.6cd9119234906243f6d1d63e60bc2b39148f3f9a: I have never heard of him. According to the report you made to the King, he is the Gnome Liaison Officer at the eastern Karamja shipyard.
textByHash.6f9d2081d6f59b59574afe302d0208e9b53d110c: You must really have impressed the King in the past.
textByHash.70de922cdbd82129c06708aff41c2f3811f6dce4: That Gnome is never stepping foot in this hangar again. He always was and still is a menace. Do you understand me?
textByHash.734ec74809b22de7cbe3edb5bb0888fa3b95061b: Very well. Notify me when you have managed to reinitialise.
textByHash.748c2b47e834fe2d1e0f4cfed6ec8337f33fa89e: Enthusiasm. I like that. We will first begin with a series of exercises designed to increase your strength and stamina.
textByHash.7a418244507525cf2cdd6423aa10651a41cedd48: You are clearly a human of many talents.
textByHash.7f2ffd0466e1aadd198a2154746eecd303a0153f: There is a teleporter round the corner. You must use this.
textByHash.829bcd3e5da9b465e26adc62c94a8f2e320ad58c: His name is Flight Commander Waydar.
textByHash.870c21648035d545680d05a4b1e74d303e2aa309: Flight Commander Waydar, I would like you to meet .
textByHash.8d103394aa483bdc6da9c75069df812c64779d58: Tough. You will be working with Flight Commander Waydar.
textByHash.8d9163666f1ebe91255f5552d9558f623860228c: Indeed I am - and you are?
textByHash.8ff261034243eb6cab0a471c8670b426832bec97: Let me introduce you to Flight Commander Waydar.
textByHash.90f590f283ae074dc163263bf4402926954530e2: As you know, the 10th squad went missing during their mission to decommission the eastern shipyard of Karamja.
textByHash.97a3d61f53ebb674bb76a7b7b579dbf183435749: Speak to Waydar when you are ready to leave.
textByHash.9a0f3ab2399be1b94ce7d9066440aebdef0ac70d: Glough left a code on the facility which periodically needs to be entered if we wish to maintain the supply of power.
textByHash.a250b93a905392bcbd7855d414d9d76f14266820: From what I have heard, not quite like those monkeys...
textByHash.a4de51077c539b454f0ffeb53286c059e7c738f5: I hope you feel like a quest adventurer ...
textByHash.a891e848209a2296ca78ff1c4897771fc817ad7a: It was a position Glough introduced. Gnome Liaison Officers are in general responsible for coordinating activities between Gnomes and other beings in our remote operations.
textByHash.a923ac365478db60244e0c113d4c4f2c40863120: I do not know him; he is from before my time. Glough would presumably have hand picked him.
textByHash.aa7d131b8280de00cf09022e161fd78dce682d00: When reinitialisation has been completed, you are to fly to the south of Karamja with and accompany her on the mission.
textByHash.abaae9b03e7b8080634dc1115d89e0033958a250: We still do not know what happened, but evidence suggests they were blown far off course to the south.
textByHash.b1e0e77b998bcc422f87e65324924b18e9decb93: Hello there. I hear your mission is complete.
textByHash.b20ebe78a0b6719abf05c9e6132bbd1f6f5a9884: Well you'd better retrieve them as soon as possible. Our enemies may extract sensitive information from them.
textByHash.b600c3e1af46264db1b83629fc49a17bf8b9f440: Sergeant Garkor holds the command of the 10th squad. As a soldier, he is extremely able. If his men are in trouble, he will be tirelessly working to save them.
textByHash.b63aedd4ae0d651233d613b29d11a8cedfef1dcf: I must first introduce you to a colleague of mine who will be accompanying you on your mission.
textByHash.bb84aca38c248329a85e2abd58739f87a20f321b: You are to be taken far to the south of Karamja, further than any Gnome has purposely travelled before. You are to investigate Caranock's claim that Garkor's squad were blown off course.
textByHash.c01e461c5f9b3b905a9dd0c8a0d3a2fc3e10a3a2: , you will have to wait till reinitialisation is complete.
textByHash.c1f7b8cd8a97c17b5ebc31ffbb84203436bbf787: It is fortunate indeed that you managed to expose him. The military gliders in this hangar are a prototype for a much refined version of the standard variety we currently use.
textByHash.c24e5433eeca13c2722bbf9d499351e51dfa96b1: Without going through this process of reinitiliasation, we cannot power the mechanism which deploys the millitary gliders.
textByHash.c2800e0923e0ccf1b73a0e54c9536a2de59ec3f6: Quite. They are now on a secret mission for the King.
textByHash.c4312344da534f742b11525120a8cac3a02f612a: You are to safeguard them on this potentially dangerous mission.
textByHash.c5ae725a87dd434b771eddd67433c22ee5021c2e: Flight Commander Waydar, now that reinitialisation is complete, I order you to fly to the south of Karamja with
textByHash.c77e66753fcf8febbd1f20f0930320c90fe1b0c0: I am afraid not. I must remain here to safeguard the Grand Tree. I will assign a Gnome agent to travel with you.
textByHash.c9efa8899475d8086aa9958ba0962fe88aed9b68: Very well. Return to me when you do.
textByHash.ccd101748e8eac28849b9d85642c50ba61847bbd: Hello again, adventurer. Would you like to return to the hangar?
textByHash.d36526b98f1e3d90c0cb2bc086c54879c11c3759: We then will follow these up by improving your attack and defence techniques.
textByHash.d52ebc69bd9d1136c0ece30a720a52312958216b: When reinitialisation has been completed, you are to fly to the south of Karamja with and accompany him on the mission.
textByHash.d84884b49d3920a6ebe7dca5265b7acd59f25a16: I see. You must be the individual who helped defeat my predecessor Glough. I hope you'll find me a more honest replacement.
textByHash.e30576e70a541ec6d339457293a86b4a1698c735: You are to safeguard him on this potentially dangerous mission.
textByHash.e79aab6af9d58bbfe4e4e7b5f95189f831643d6e: We try to ensure the location of the hangar remains a secret. If you must know something, then know that it lies directly beneath the Gnomeball pitch. However, I cannot reveal the location of its entrance.
textByHash.ea73eba932671e906629600ee9b0b7299ee32c4e: Welcome, adventurer, to the Underground Military Glider Hangar.
textByHash.ecb10f8d45082ba34d8f180a133893139c7902e7: ... because you are going to get one.
textByHash.f1e9f8a26457112e248f3f445406d5b390788e98: We do not, if the truth be told. This hangar was part of Glough's contingency planning. Had the attacks by land and sea failed, he would have turned to air.
textByHash.f75e84577dd5812eb3e287b508c5ab08ae48f348: , speak to Waydar when you are ready to leave.
textByHash.ffd795e0ddeb8cb9b1669cc65fdc9bc91f1c7b2b: We must go now and meet Waydar. For security reasons I must ask you to wear a blindfold.
